sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48171" key="qeodrome/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θεο-δρομέω</orth>, <sense id="n48171.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">walk in God's ways</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
